raw.message: Parie sur le meilleur du foot européen avec Betclic ! 🏆⚽️

hook.summary: A man gives a high-energy motivational speech in a locker room setting.
hook.visual_action: A bearded man in a black t-shirt gestures emphatically while talking to a group in a locker room.
hook.voiceover_transcript: Les meilleurs joueurs, les meilleures ambiances, les meilleurs stades

scene_flow: Motivational locker room speech about the best players and stadiums.
Transition through a tunnel to a close-up of the speaker.
Speaker encourages the viewer to 'combine' bets.
Flashy graphic reveal of a 100€ freebet offer over a football field background.
Final screen with team logos and a call-to-action button.
audience_proxy: French-speaking male football fans interested in sports betting and high-stakes competition.
